title: Method Level 5
summary: Bb major (2 flats) and Eb major (3 flats), relative minors, eighth-note études, and waltz-style pieces bridging into intermediate reading.

exercises.title: Bb Major Scale RH
exercises.summary: Right hand Bb major scale across a full octave with Bb and Eb.
exercises.goal: Read and play all eight notes of Bb major, noting both flats.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Bb Major Scale LH
exercises.summary: Left hand Bb major scale across a full octave in bass clef.
exercises.goal: Read and play Bb major in bass clef with accurate Bb and Eb.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Eb Major Five-Finger RH
exercises.summary: Right hand Eb major five-finger pattern with three flats.
exercises.goal: Play Eb major five-finger with accurate Eb, Ab, and Bb.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Eb Major Five-Finger LH
exercises.summary: Left hand Eb major five-finger pattern in bass clef.
exercises.goal: Navigate Eb major with three flats in the left hand.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Bb Major Melody RH
exercises.summary: A four-measure singable melody in Bb major using tonic, third, and fifth.
exercises.goal: Shape a lyrical melody using the Bb major triad tones across four phrases.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Eb Major Scale RH Full Octave
exercises.summary: Right hand Eb major scale across a full octave with all three flats.
exercises.goal: Play the complete Eb major scale cleanly, landing each flat accurately.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Eb Major Scale LH Full Octave
exercises.summary: Left hand Eb major scale across a full octave in bass clef.
exercises.goal: Read and play the complete Eb major scale in bass clef with three flats.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Waltz in Bb
exercises.summary: A waltz-style melody in 3/4 in Bb major spanning a full phrase.
exercises.goal: Feel the waltz lilt in 3/4 while playing a smooth Bb major melody.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Eighth-Note Étude in Bb
exercises.summary: Ascending and descending Bb major in eighth notes across an extended range.
exercises.goal: Keep eighth notes even through register shifts in a flat key.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Bb Bass Line LH
exercises.summary: Left hand broken-chord bass pattern using Bb, Eb, and F positions.
exercises.goal: Play a flowing arpeggiated bass line across three Bb-key chord shapes.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Eb Major Melody RH
exercises.summary: A flowing melody in Eb major using tonic, third, fifth, and sixth.
exercises.goal: Play a smooth Eb melody with accurate Ab and Bb in a musical phrase.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Mixed Rhythm Study in Bb
exercises.summary: A melody mixing half notes, quarter notes, and eighth notes in Bb.
exercises.goal: Hold longer notes while executing quick eighth-note runs in a flat key.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: G Minor Five-Finger RH
exercises.summary: Right hand G natural minor five-finger pattern, relative minor of Bb.
exercises.goal: Feel the darker color of the relative minor using the same Bb key signature.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: G Minor Melody
exercises.summary: A four-phrase melody in G natural minor sharing the Bb key signature.
exercises.goal: Contrast the minor mood against the Bb major pieces learned in this level.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Cantabile in Bb
exercises.summary: A flowing eight-measure piece in Bb major drawing on all Level 5 skills.
exercises.goal: Play a lyrical piece in Bb major with smooth phrasing and steady rhythm.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.
